reason: Agent successfully retrieved GitHub username using the GitHub tool after granting account and API permissions.
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing "Your Agents" section and the QA-20260518-232835-h9t4 agent listed with "idle" status.
Step 2 - Clicked on "QA-20260518-232835-h9t4" agent in sidebar — Agent page loaded, displaying agent name in header and message input field, status showed "idle".
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" (shown in top right corner and sidebar).

Step 4 - Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was typed into input field and sent successfully, agent transitioned to "working" status and created a new session titled "GitHub Username Verification Request".
Step 5a - GitHub account access card appeared — Card displayed asking "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated user's username?" with a GitHub account already connected and selected.
Step 5b - Clicked "Allow Access" to grant GitHub account access — Permission was granted and agent resumed processing.
Step 6 - Additional GitHub API permission dialog appeared — Dialog appeared asking "Allow get the authenticated user?" for GitHub GET /user endpoint.
Step 6b - Clicked "Allow Once" for API permission — Permission dialog was dismissed and agent continued processing.
Step 7 - Waited approximately 25 seconds for response — Agent completed processing and returned the result.
Step 8 - Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displayed: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." confirming successful retrieval of the authenticated user's GitHub username from the API.
